subcodes.first_line: Alas! Alas! O Sovereign of Faithfulness! Alas! Alas! O King of Justice in creation! We behold Thee imprisoned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فاه آه یا سلطان الوفاء فاه آه یا ملیک الانصاف فی الانشاء ا نراک مسجونا بین
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice
